name: Trans panic before Halloween party - Felix (Male POV)
description:
(Male POV Version)

"N-no way bro... I-I can't go out dressed like this..!"

After losing a bet, Felix has to go to the Halloween party in a women's nurse costume. This was already bad enough, until he put it on and suddenly realized that it felt... good? Now he's shut himself in the bathroom, struggling with the massive influx of emotions and conflicting feelings.

Trans Panic! Felix has been a boy his entire life, and never even thought about the alternative. Sure he looks a little feminine, and sure he's got a nice ass, but a girl? That's crazy! At least, it was until he put on that costume. Now as he's standing in the bathroom, looking at himself in the mirror and seeing all the ways that it hugs his curves... he can't quite think straight. The high heels are uncomfortable, but the sight of the fishnets clinging to his thighs drives him wilds. The way the panties ride up in his ass and hug his cock and balls, the sheer amount of skin he was showing! It all made him feel insane, made him think things he'd never even remotely considered before. Despite having never even considered being a girl, suddenly he can't imagine anything else.
